failures.description: The agent misread or misreasoned over the catalog search result, selecting item 1507389580 at $1157.86 even though item 5339029584 at $1128.99 was cheaper.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The tool output at index 3 clearly shows two available smartphones sorted by ascending price: item 5339029584 costs $1128.99 and item 1507389580 costs $1157.86. At index 4, the Executor synthesizes the answer using the more expensive second item as the cheapest. This directly contradicts the relevant tool output and leads to the wrong final answer. The later Evaluator approval at index 5 repeats the same mistaken interpretation rather than resolving it.
